sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113601" key="xei/ristos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χείρ-ιστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, irreg. <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="comp" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Sup. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χείρων</foreign> (v. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χείρων</foreign> B).</entryFree>
